description_long: This is a single, low-cut casual shoe crafted primarily from light tan leather, featuring a woven pattern on the upper front section for breathability and style. The shoe has a rounded toe and a lace-up closure with thin leather laces threaded through small eyelets. The midsole and outsole are made from a textured, rope-like material, likely jute or a similar fiber, giving it an espadrille-inspired appearance. The sides of the shoe are smooth with minimal stitching, and the heel is reinforced for durability. The interior appears to be lined with a softer leather or fabric for comfort. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A tan leather casual shoe with a woven upper, lace-up closure, and a rope-textured sole, designed for comfort and breathability.
description_view_0: Front view shows the woven leather upper, rounded toe, and lace-up closure.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the smooth leather side, rope-textured sole, and low-cut profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the reinforced heel and the shoe's overall width.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the woven upper and rope-textured sole.
